center.name: 南盧安瓜國家公園
center.summary: 南盧安瓜國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Horus swift，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Horus swift (Apus horus) is a small bird in the swift family Apodidae that is found in sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Horus swift (Apus horus) is a small bird in the swift family Apodidae that is found in sub-Saharan Africa
